title: glycosmis petelotii
intro: Glycosmis petelotii is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Java citron or Indonesian citron. It is a small, evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, and its leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Glycosmis petelotii include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. The leaves and fruits of this plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting digestive health.
